summary: P1.8-10 B1.3: Adds two-step Juli suggestion accordion on Home metric tiles — expand reveals Gợi ý từ Juli with --info styling and Decisions CTA; estimated bar kept as secondary fallback; keyboard and aria-expanded supported.

interfaceChanges.description: Metric tiles with journey links now expand inline Juli suggestion accordion before Decisions CTA; RealEstimatedBar remains fallback link.

mappings.criterion: Expanded state shows Gợi ý từ Juli with blue info styling
